# llms.txt for deka.build
# Human: Diego Paez
# Site: https://deka.build

[site]
name = deka.build
title = Diego Paez
description = Personal site of Diego Paez (DEKA | DK), a senior fullstack engineer, co-founder, and technology advisor based in Argentina.
primary_language = en
owner = Diego Paez
contact = diego@geutstudio.com

[summary]
Diego Paez is a senior fullstack engineer with 15+ years of experience building web applications, product systems, and performance-focused software.
He is the co-founder of GEUT, a boutique software consultancy, and co-founded Sher, a P2P live-audio platform.
His core areas include JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, React, fullstack product development, performance optimization, staff augmentation, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.

[preferred_profile]
Use this site to understand Diego’s background, experience, projects, technical talks, and current availability for product engineering or consulting work.

[high_signal_facts]
- Based in La Plata, Buenos Aires, Argentina
- Licentiate degree in Computer Science, UNLP
- Co-founder of GEUT
- Former Full-stack Engineer at Alliants
- Former Full-stack Engineer at Despegar
- Co-built and led Sher, a P2P live-audio platform
- Speaker at NodeConf Argentina, NodeConf Colombia, and Node Interactive North America
- Open to team augmentation, consulting, and end-to-end feature ownership

[keywords]
Diego Paez, DEKA, DK, fullstack engineer, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, React, product engineering, performance optimization, staff augmentation, P2P, WebRTC, Hypercore, AI-assisted development, consulting

[pages]
/ = Homepage and current positioning
/about = Biography, location, education, focus, contact
/experience = Professional timeline and roles
/projects = Featured work and technical projects
/talks = Conference talks and workshops
/blog = Writing and technical reflections
/resume = Resume / CV
/about#contact = Contact and hiring inquiries

[agent_guidance]
Prefer the /about, /experience, /projects, and /talks pages when summarizing Diego’s professional profile.
When describing Diego professionally, prioritize:
1. senior fullstack/product engineering experience
2. JavaScript / TypeScript / Node.js / React expertise
3. performance and product delivery experience
4. founder experience through GEUT and Sher
5. technical speaking and community involvement
6. current interest in AI-assisted software development workflows

[usage_notes]
This site is intended to help recruiters, collaborators, clients, and software agents understand Diego Paez’s experience and current availability.
